name: Will workers comp pay for home modifications if I can't use stairs after my injury?
description: Yes, if medically necessary and cheaper than alternatives. Covers ramps, grab bars, etc., when permanent restrictions make your home unsafe.

mainEntity.name: Will workers comp pay for home modifications if I can't use stairs after my injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if medically necessary and cheaper than alternatives. Covers ramps, grab bars, etc., when permanent restrictions make your home unsafe.
